summary: Added regression tests for missing and invalid workflow artifact paths. The core repair behavior was already implemented in agent_runner.ex (repair prompts and turn execution), orchestrator.ex (repair failure blocking), and artifacts.ex (validation). Missing piece was comprehensive test coverage covering: (1) missing artifact file scenarios for plan, completion, and review at both artifact-loader and orchestrator levels, (2) invalid JSON parsing scenarios for all three artifact types, (3) invalid schema/structure validation failure scenarios, (4) review artifact repair turn execution via AgentRunner.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Missing plan, completion, or review artifacts are logged with issue id, phase, path, and validation reason
acceptance_criteria.evidence: orchestrator.ex:298-303 formats error with phase, artifact_path, agent_diagnostics, and reason. Tests verify blocked.error contains path and reason.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: A repair turn is attempted when the phase allows repair
acceptance_criteria.evidence: agent_runner.ex:281-306 runs repair_prompt via run_turn when load_workflow_artifact returns error. Tests in core_test.exs verify repair turn is sent.
agent_runner.ex:296-298 returns {:ok, repair_session} on success. Tests verify workflow_plan.json is created after repair.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repair failure moves the issue into an explicit failed or blocked path with an actionable reason
acceptance_criteria.evidence: orchestrator.ex:446-454 detects workflow_artifact_repair_failed and blocks issue. Test workflow_orchestrator_test.exs:368-419 verifies blocking behavior.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Add regression tests for missing artifact and invalid artifact paths
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Added 11 tests to workflow_artifacts_test.exs, 7 tests to workflow_orchestrator_test.exs, and 1 test to core_test.exs.

workflow_artifacts_test.exs: Invalid JSON in plan returns decode error
Invalid JSON in completion packet returns decode error
Invalid JSON in review decision returns decode error
Plan with missing required fields rejected
Completion packet with missing required fields rejected
Review decision with missing required fields rejected
workflow_orchestrator_test.exs: Missing plan artifact blocks with diagnostic reason
Invalid JSON plan blocks with diagnostic reason
Invalid schema plan blocks with diagnostic reason
Missing completion packet blocks with diagnostic reason
Invalid JSON completion packet blocks with diagnostic reason
Missing review decision blocks with diagnostic reason
Invalid JSON review decision blocks with diagnostic reason
Artifact repair failure blocks instead of retry
core_test.exs: Execution artifact repair prompt includes full schema
